scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules client/node_modules server/node_modules client/dist server/dist
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:lambda: npm run db:deploy && npm run dev:lambda:sam
scripts.dev:lambda:invoke: sam local invoke -t template.yaml ApiFunction --event tests/lambda/events/api-health.json
scripts.build: npm run build -w @turnier-hub/shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.prod:prepare: npm run db:generate -w server && npm run build
scripts.prod: npm run prod:prepare && npm run prod:start
scripts.db:restart: npm run db:stop && npm run db:start
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:prepare -w server && npm run test:integration -w client
